---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to a skill, the pipeline, or the docs
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem / motivation
What's missing or awkward today? Who does it affect (self-petitioners, contributors, a field)?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like niw-guru to do. If it touches the pipeline, say which stage/skill.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about.

## Keeping the guardrails
Does this respect the project's rules — read-only source, **zero unverified claims** (no
fabricated sources/quotes/pages), no real PII in examples, and "not legal advice" framing? Note
anything relevant.

## Anything else
Links, examples, or prior art (e.g. how another tool handles it).
